query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_sem_projeto,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) as total_leads,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads), 2) as percentual
FROM leads 
WHERE projetoCustom IS NULL OR projetoCustom = '';
